cells.rationale: Founding new-pattern architecture: defines the descriptor contract every leaf derives from, wide blast radius, the epic's early proof point.
Help-purity defect fix plus first plugin descriptor migration, but conforms to ordinal-1's shape and mirrors subgroup.ts; single-plugin blast radius.
Wide-but-mechanical 34-verb descriptor extraction feeding a drift gate; correctness-sensitive metadata keeps opus, established leaf-help pattern keeps effort at high.
Three bounded named fixes, but the route-help-before-deps reroute is correctness-sensitive (must keep db/daemon/state-dir off the path).
Regression-proof for the whole purity architecture: stub-dep walk + import-graph gate design, may need minimal DispatchDeps seams; getting the gate genuinely catching drift is subtle.
Shared duration grammar is well-specified (Go ParseDuration subset); wide hard-cutover flag renames are mechanical across surfaces, clear path spanning files.
Output-format contract touching scripts' stdout: byte-parity exemptions, envelope discipline, format_modes truth across plan/prompt/native — a wrong abstraction propagates.
Hard-cutover semantic disambiguation (never-repurpose-a-flag), live panel-runner tooling must migrate atomically, broad citation sweep across skills/docs.
Genuinely mechanical cross-repo snippet find-replace with grep-to-zero acceptance and clear exclusions; the exact route-down case for a cheaper tier.
Wide cross-cutting cutover with load-bearing allowed-tools permission globs (silent-strip risk), byte-parity envelopes, corpus re-vendor + BAKE re-render gates.
Multi-surface --agent-help runbook authoring plus pure pass-through wiring following the existing 5-subcommand pattern; opus for prose quality, high for the known pattern.
